英國英格蘭坎布利其爾波迪夏馬
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Alington於1365年出生在英國坎布利其爾波迪夏馬時，他的父親William Alington25歲，母親Dionysia Mallett46歲。他於大約1393年與Joane de Burgh在英國坎布利其爾波迪夏馬結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1429年被列為speaker of the house of commons。他去世於1446年10月19日在英國艾可享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾波迪夏馬。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Alington于1365年出生在英国坎布利其爾波迪夏馬时，他的父亲William Alington25岁，母亲Dionysia Mallett46岁。他于大约1393年与Joane de Burgh在英国坎布利其爾波迪夏馬结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1429年被列为speaker of the house of commons。他去世于1446年10月19日在英国艾可享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾波迪夏馬。

nameMeanings.name: Alington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Allington
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from any of at least nine different places called Allington, two in Kent, three in Wiltshire, and one each in Dorset, Devon, Hampshire, and Lincolnshire. These have different origins: those in Devon, Wiltshire near Chippenham, and Kent near Maidstone are from the Old English personal name Ælla + -ingtūn meaning ‘Ælla's farm’; those in Dorset, Wiltshire near Devizes, and Lincolnshire are named with Old English ætheling ‘prince' + tūn, meaning ‘settlement of the prince’; those in Hampshire and Wiltshire near Amesbury are from the Old English personal name Ealda + tūn; and the one in Kent near Lenham is from the Old English personal name Æthelnōth + -ingtūn, meaning ‘Æthelnōth's farm’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Alington was born in 1365, in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, William Alington, was 25 and his mother, Dionysia Mallett, was 46. He married Joane de Burgh about 1393, in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. In 1429, his occupation is listed as speaker of the house of commons. He died on 19 October 1446, in Essex, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Alington est né en 1365, à Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, William Alington, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Dionysia Mallett, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Joane de Burgh environ 1393, à Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. En 1429, sa profession de son indiquée est speaker of the house of commons. Il est décédé le 19 octobre 1446, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Alington 1365 in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Alington 25 und seine Mutter Dionysia Mallett 46. Er hat um 1393 in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England Joane de Burgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. 1429 ist sein Beruf als speaker of the house of commons aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. Oktober 1446 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Essex, England und wurde in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Alington è nato il nel 1365 nel Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, William Alington, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Dionysia Mallett, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Joane de Burgh circa 1393, nel Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Nel 1429, la sua occupazione è indicata come speaker of the house of commons. Morì il 19 ottobre 1446, nel Essex, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Alingtonが1365年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボッティシャムで生まれた時，父William Alingtonは25歳，母Dionysia Mallettは46歳であった。約1393年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボッティシャムでJoane de Burghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。1429年，職業はspeaker of the house of commonsと記録されている。彼は1446年10月19日にイギリスエセックスで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボッティシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Alington(이)가 1365년 영국 캄브리지실르 벗티샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Alington(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Dionysia Mallett(은)는 46세였다. 그는 대략 1393년 영국 캄브리지실르 벗티샤에서 Joane de Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1429년, 그의 직업은 speaker of the house of commons이었다. 그는 1446년 10월 19일 영국 에세스에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 벗티샤에 묻혔다.

pt.from 23 September 1429 to 23 February 14: de 23 de setembro de 1429 a 23 de fevereiro de 1430
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Alington nasceu em 1365, em Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Alington, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Dionysia Mallett, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane de Burgh aproximadamente 1393, em Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Em 1429, sua profissão aparece como speaker of the house of commons. Ele faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1446, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Alington родился в 1365 г. в местности боттишам, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Alington было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Dionysia Mallett, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane de Burgh около 1393 г. в местности боттишам, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1429 году он работал по профессии speaker of the house of commons. Он умер 19 октября 1446 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности боттишам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.from 23 September 1429 to 23 February 14: desde 23 de septiembre de 1429 hasta 23 de febrero de 1430
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Alington nació en 1365, en Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Alington, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Dionysia Mallett, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Joane de Burgh aproximadamente 1393, en Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. En 1429, su ocupación registrada era speaker of the house of commons. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1446, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
